statics.description: As long as you control eight or more lands, CARDNAME gets +5/+5.

abilities.description: Choose target creature you control. Each other creature you control becomes a copy of it until end of turn, except those creatures aren't legendary if the chosen creature is legendary.

effect.description: Choose target creature you control. Each other creature you control becomes a copy of it until end of turn, except those creatures aren't legendary if the chosen creature is legendary.
effect.name: Clone
